curation_rule: Scanner entries are unverified until Matthew promotes durable facts into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md.

releases.subject: Hyperagent updates: Opus 4.8 + integrations
extracted_bullets: Claude Opus 4.8 can run Hyperagent agents and is positioned as better for long-running tasks, honesty about performance, self-correction, spatial reasoning, copywriting, coding, and resourceful reasoning.
Hyperagent announced native integrations for common tools and support for custom MCP servers.
Native integrations give more control over the experience and more precise tool use.
releases.raw_excerpt: Hyperagent announced Opus 4.8, native integrations for common tools, and custom MCP support.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Fwd: Hyperagent updates - Apr 23
extracted_bullets: Hyperagent can dispatch specialized subagents in parallel, each with a name, role, and focused task.
The orchestrator synthesizes subagent findings across research, analysis, and execution.
The redesigned Agent page exposes prompt, tools, knowledge, and integrations, with accessible threads and auto-save while editing.
Named agents can use more than one Gmail account for the same integration, selected from a multi-select picker.
Skills teach an agent a reusable process once so workspace agents can use it repeatedly.
releases.raw_excerpt: Apr 23 update covering subagents, redesigned Agent page, multiple Gmail accounts per named agent, and skills.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Fwd: Hyperagent updates: Deploy agents to your team
extracted_bullets: Agents and skills can be published to a Team so coworkers can use the agent from the web app.
Shared agents can be packaged with skills, memories, and tools.
Shared credentials can be included, or teammates can bring their own credentials.
Agents still have one owner; co-owning or editing an agent config with teammates was not supported in this release.
Threads and artifacts can be shared read-only, with links limited to trusted email domains.
Hyperagent recommends codifying agent jobs into skills, scripts, and memories for quality and cost consistency.
releases.raw_excerpt: May 14 update covering Team publishing, shared skills/agents, credential options, one-owner limitation, and thread/artifact sharing.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Fwd: Hyperagent updates - May 7
extracted_bullets: Live mode lets an agent work continuously in the background in a single thread with a checklist and schedule.
Live mode agents can reach out proactively if something needs attention.
Hyperagent can edit webpages and dashboards inline and save changes directly to the artifact.
Usage caps can be set for pay-as-you-go billing.
A builder example described connecting GitHub and Cloudflare to update and link a custom domain.
releases.raw_excerpt: May 7 update covering Live mode, inline webpage edits, usage caps, and a GitHub/Cloudflare builder example.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Fwd: Hyperagent updates - Apr 30
extracted_bullets: Agents can be configured to always use the latest Opus or Sonnet model.
Supported Claude models use the full 1M-token context window by default.
Command Center surfaces scheduled runs that failed, timed out, or hit billing blocks, with clear error messages.
A sales outreach agent example drafts Gmail messages, monitors replies, learns from response data, audits a website, and suggests copy changes.
An Airtable data science example connected Hyperagent to Databricks, loaded business context, and deployed the agent directly in Slack.
A daily pipeline example pulls market data from multiple government APIs, calculates outputs, and writes one clean row per day into a dataset.
releases.raw_excerpt: Apr 30 update covering latest-model settings, 1M Claude context, scheduled-run visibility, Gmail, Databricks, Slack, and automated data pipelines.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Fwd: Hyperagent updates: Join our Livestream + Discord
extracted_bullets: Airtable integration was rebuilt using the latest MCP server.
Airtable can be queried even when the user only has interface-level permissions.
Knowledge access can use predefined modes, including Personal for broad memories and skills access, and Curated for explicit linking.
Granular knowledge permissions remain available when needed.
Agents can be deployed to Slack with a custom identity so they can be mentioned by name.
Examples include monthly scraper skills, daily cron checks, weekly agents, and turning repeated work into skills.
releases.raw_excerpt: May 21 update covering Airtable MCP, knowledge modes, Slack custom identity, and scheduled operating patterns.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Fwd: Composio Incident Response
extracted_bullets: Composio-powered integrations were disabled in Hyperagent after a Composio security incident.
The incident did not impact Hyperagent's own systems or software code according to the email.
Many services can already be connected natively in Hyperagent through skills that call a service API directly and store credentials securely within the skill.
Hyperagent said native integrations for widely used tools like GSuite and GitHub were being built.
releases.raw_excerpt: Composio incident response covering disabled Composio integrations, direct API skills, and native GSuite/GitHub integration direction.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Connect your tools to Hyperagent
extracted_bullets: Hyperagent can search the web and write code out of the box.
Connected tools let agents pull from actual data.
Examples include reading Slack threads, pulling from Airtable, HubSpot, or a data warehouse, checking calendar context, and reading Gmail to draft replies.
releases.raw_excerpt: Activation email covering built-in web/code capability and connected-tool examples.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.

releases.subject: Your first 10 minutes with Hyperagent
extracted_bullets: Hyperagent can research live websites, write and run code, analyze data, create visualizations, work with uploaded files, and generate images, video, and audio in a single thread.
Users can describe the desired outcome without breaking the task into steps and let the agent figure out the path.
releases.raw_excerpt: Activation email describing Hyperagent's built-in work surface across web research, code, data analysis, files, visualization, and media generation.
releases.promotion_notes: Durable facts promoted into docs/context/hyperagent-platform.md on 2026-05-31.
